mapper.sql: id, article_id, chapter_id, plot_name, plot_content, recovery_chapter_id, res_state, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM plot WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1

SELECT
FROM plot WHERE article_id = #{articleId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY chapter_id, create_time

SELECT
FROM plot WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time

SELECT
FROM plot WHERE recovery_chapter_id = #{recoveryChapterId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time
